title: Daily Passes
subtitle: Manage daily passes in the system

table.noDataDescription: Generate a new daily pass to get started.

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this daily pass?
delete.error: Error deleting the pass. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Daily Passes module
welcome.description: In this module you can generate temporary access passes. This guide will show you the main features.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: From here you can generate a new daily pass. Select the person and the expiration date.

table.title: Daily passes table
table.description: List of generated passes with name, document, status and expiration date. Use the QR button to view the code and the delete button to deactivate a pass.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.
